prompt: Convert autumn forest to winter snowscape.
prompt_refined: Edit image 2, an information graphic of a forest, to depict a winter snowscape. Use image 1 as a visual guide for the snow and winter tree aesthetics. Transform the brown ground in image 2 into snow-covered terrain. Adapt the green trees to a winter state, such as bare branches or snow-laden evergreens, maintaining image 2's simplified, iconographic style.
